sources.kind: media (the 2026-07-17 pass cited it only via a LinkedIn summary; its URL was recovered from DATA_PROVENANCE.md during the 2026-07-18 adversarial audit, re-fetched and hash-preserved — the live page names Point FM, Kříž, the 80M valuation and the five-percent stake. A parallel attempt to corroborate via Point FM's own site failed: JS-rendered page, no readable content — recorded in provider-runs, not used as evidence)
